percentage-precision.name: Percentage Precision
percentage-precision.description: Controls how many decimal places to show.

label-size.name: Label Size
label-size.description: Controls how big the percentage label is.

label-opacity.name: Label Opacity
label-opacity.description: Controls how visible the percentage label is.

label-font.name: Label Font
label-font.description:
Controls the font used in the percentage label.

Notes:

<cj>-3</c> is Pusab, <cj>-2</c> is <cy>Golden</c> Pusab, <cj>-1</c> is Helvetica/Aller (depends on your graphics quality setting) and <cj>0</c> is whatever font is used in the level
- <cy>To use font numbers greater than 0: Refer to the level editor for the font each number corresponds to, subtract that number by 1, and then put it here.</c>

If you'd like to use a custom font (requires a .fnt file), enable the "Use Custom Font" setting.

label-color.name: Label Color
label-color.description: Controls the color of the percentage label.

use-custom-font.name: Use Custom Font
use-custom-font.description: Uses the font file specified by the "Font File" setting.

font-file.name: Font File
font-file.enable-if-description: You cannot use custom fonts if custom fonts aren't enabled, silly!
font-file.description:
The .fnt file to use as the custom font.

If the text looks weird, try using the -uhd or -hd versions.

name: Labeled Checkpoints
description: Adds a percentage label to checkpoints
